svg.title: Synalux POS — wallet pay
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for wallet pay. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: No additional hardware cost . Same Stripe processing rate
Accept Venmo, PayPal, and Cash App via QR codes
Scan with Venmo app to pay
Pay with PayPal balance or linked card
Server selects wallet type on POS
QR displayed on customer screen or printed
Customer scans with their wallet app
Payment confirmed via webhook -> POS updates
Funds settle T+1 to venue bank account
